ateusz Czaplinski and Petko Yotov). Version 2.2.0-beta64 (2007-11-13) Add times to PmWiki date parsing (e.g., 2007-08-09T12:22:04). Suppress warning from ini_set in diag.php (suggested by Petko). Fix handling of -> links in trails (reported by Eemeli
